incidents.title: The Iranian acting defense minister has said the country’s defense, missile, and drone power are a “red line” of national security that will not be subject to any form of negotiation.

Emirates' third daily flight between Dubai and Nairobi touches down at Jomo Kenyatta International Airport for the first time. With the launch of Flight EK717, Emirates now operates 21 weekly flights between Dubai and Nairobi.

DP World records a new milestone in the modernisation of the Port of Tartous in Syria with the arrival of the first of three new Mobile Harbour Cranes, each capable of handling approximately 2 million tonnes of cargo annually. Once all three cranes become operational, the port's cargo-handling capacity will increase by approximately 40%. The new cranes form part of DP World's total US$800 million investment programme to facilitate regional trade and supporting Syria's long-term economic recovery.
